About Me

Welcome to my portfolio! I'm a first-year Bachelor of Science student in Computer Science, passionate about learning and creating innovative solutions through code. I'm particularly interested in web development, front-end technologies, and building user-friendly applications.

As a student developer, I'm continuously expanding my skills and working on projects that challenge me to think creatively and solve problems efficiently. I believe in the power of continuous learning and am excited to share my journey with you.

Education

Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

Status: First Year

Focus Areas: Programming, Web Development, Computer Fundamentals

Currently pursuing my BSc in Computer Science with a strong foundation in computer programming and information technology.

📰 Array Express

Interactive Newsletter

A beautifully designed newsletter built with modern web technologies. Array Express features an engaging layout with responsive design principles to ensure excellent user experience across all devices.
